404.title: Looks like the page has vanished into thin air.

bind.autoInputPlaceholder: Double click to enable button recording
bind.hint: Multiple mappings can share the same shortcut and trigger together. Extra keys won't block a combo, but a longer matching combo takes priority.

pointerId.label: PointerID
pointerId.hint: Each PointerID represents a single virtual finger, which can only touch one coordinate at a time. Buttons sharing the same PointerID will conflict if pressed simultaneously — assign different PointerIDs to any buttons that may be pressed together.

id.label: Config ID
id.hint: Used by scripts or external APIs to reference this mapping exactly. Click the copy icon to copy it.

common.noMainDevice: Main controlled device not found, please control the device on the devices page
common.randomOffsetXHint: Random horizontal offset applied each activation, picked from [-offset, +offset]. Set to 0 to disable.
common.randomOffsetYHint: Random vertical offset applied each activation, picked from [-offset, +offset]. Set to 0 to disable.

scriptHooks.beforeHint: Runs before this mapping action. Leave empty to skip. Scripts block the current mapping flow, so slow scripts can cause input latency or stuck mappings.
scriptHooks.beforePlaceholder: Script to run before the action
scriptHooks.afterHint: Runs after this mapping action. Leave empty to skip. Scripts block the current mapping flow, so slow scripts can cause input latency or stuck mappings.
scriptHooks.afterPlaceholder: Script to run after the action

setting.title: Mapping Configuration - SingleTap
setting.syncHint: When enabled, the touch lasts as long as the shortcut is held, ignoring the duration setting.
setting.durationHint: Touch duration before auto-release (ms). An ongoing tap won't be interrupted by pressing the shortcut again.

setting.title: Mapping Configuration - RepeatTap
setting.durationHint: How long each touch lasts (ms). Should be shorter than the repeat interval.
setting.intervalHint: Time between the start of consecutive touches (ms). The duration should be shorter than this interval.
setting.randomOffsetXHint: Random offset is recalculated for each repeat tap, so every tap lands at a slightly different X coordinate.
setting.randomOffsetYHint: Random offset is recalculated for each repeat tap, so every tap lands at a slightly different Y coordinate.

setting.title: Mapping Configuration - MultipleTap
setting.durationHint: How long this touch is held before release (ms).
setting.waitHint: Wait time before this touch operation begins (ms).
setting.operationsHint: Sequence of touch operations executed in order: wait → touch → hold for duration → release. Edit positions in the visual editor.
setting.operationsHelp: Drag with the left mouse button and add or edit with the right mouse button

setting.title: Mapping Configuration - Swipe
setting.enableRandomizationHint: Replaces straight line segments with smooth curves that have random arc curvature, making each swipe trajectory slightly different.
setting.positonsHelp: Drag with the left mouse button and add or edit with the right mouse button
setting.durationHint: Total time to complete the entire swipe motion (ms).

setting.title: Mapping Configuration - DirectionPad
setting.initDurationHint: Initial slide duration before the pad responds (ms). Helps work around games that miss the initial touch.
setting.maxOffsetHint: Maximum drag distance of the virtual finger from the pad center along the horizontal and vertical axes.
setting.upBoostKeyHint: While this modifier key is held, pressing the up key can extend beyond the normal maximum offset range.
setting.upBoostScaleHint: Multiplier applied to the upward offset while the boost key is held. E.g., 2.0 doubles the upward reach.
setting.enableRandomizationHint: Adds random anchor offset, arc-shaped slide paths, and continuous drift to simulate natural finger movement.
setting.randomOffsetHint: Random offset range applied to the pad center each time it is pressed.
setting.randomDistanceScaleHint: Random multiplier applied to the distance from the center to the target point on each direction change.
setting.jitterOffsetHint: Range for touch drift around the current target point while holding the same direction.

setting.title: Mapping Configuration - MouseCastSpell
setting.centerHint: Reference point for cast direction calculation, typically the character's position on screen. Adjust if the character is not centered due to perspective projection.
setting.scaleFactorHint: Controls horizontal/vertical scaling of the cast direction mapping. Use to calibrate mouse-to-game direction when the game has perspective distortion (e.g. Honor of Kings: X=7, Y=10).
setting.castRadiusHint: Mouse distance beyond this range drags the skill button to max radius; below it, distance scales proportionally.
setting.dragRadiusHint: The maximum drag radius of the skill button in the game UI.

releaseMode.label: Release timing
releaseMode.hint: OnRelease: activates on press, releases on release. OnPress: releases immediately on press. OnSecondPress: first press activates, second press releases.

setting.castNoDirectionHint: Ignores direction settings and simply taps at the cast position. Similar to SingleTap but cancelable.
setting.editHelp: Drag with the left mouse button and edit with the right mouse button

setting.title: Mapping Configuration - PadCastSpell
setting.dragRadiusHint: The maximum drag radius of the skill button in the game UI.
setting.blockHint: Blocks direction pad shortcuts while casting to prevent input conflicts.
setting.enableRandomizationHint: Adds random anchor offset, arc-shaped slide paths, and continuous micro-jitter to simulate natural finger movement.

releaseMode.label: Release timing
releaseMode.hint: OnRelease: activates on press, releases on release. OnSecondPress: first press activates, second press releases.

setting.sensitivityHint: Only active in FPS mode. Fire button drag speed relative to mouse movement, independent from FPS sensitivity.
setting.title: Mapping Configuration - Fire

setting.sensitivityHint: View rotation speed relative to mouse movement. At screen edges, the finger auto-recenters to continue tracking.
setting.maxOffsetHint: Maximum distance from the FPS start position to the local boundary. Set an axis to -1 for no local limit.
setting.touchModeHint: When the touch reaches the local boundary, it returns to the start position and continues dragging. Single touch: lift the current pointer, then immediately press the same pointer at the start. Immediate handoff: immediately press the alternate pointer at the start, lift the old pointer, then move the alternate pointer. Delayed handoff: immediately press the alternate pointer, wait for the configured delay, lift the old pointer, then move the alternate pointer. Overlap handoff: immediately press the alternate pointer; on the next mouse move, both pointers participate: the old pointer moves and lifts, and the alternate pointer continues moving.
setting.anotherPointerIdHint: The other pointer_id alternated with the primary pointer. It must differ from the primary pointer.
setting.touchModeIntervalHint: Milliseconds to wait before lifting the old pointer in delayed handoff mode.
setting.title: Mapping Configuration - FPS

setting.sensitivityHint: View drag speed relative to mouse movement. Higher = faster.
setting.title: Mapping Configuration - Observation
setting.maxRadiusHint: Max drag distance from the start position. Set to 0 for no limit.

home.emptyBind: There are buttons without a bind configuration!
home.migration: Migration to current main device size
home.fileInputPlaceholder: Please enter the new config name
home.deletePrompt: Are you sure you want to delete this?
home.differentName: The new config name cannot be the same as the current config!

setting.title: Mapping Configuration - Script
setting.pressed_script_placeholder: Executed once when the hotkey is pressed
setting.pressedScriptHint: Runs once on press. Supports the full scripting DSL.
setting.intervalHint: Interval between script repeats while holding (ms). Script execution time should be less than this interval.
setting.held_script_placeholder: Repeatedly executed while the hotkey is held down
setting.heldScriptHint: Runs repeatedly at the specified interval while held. Execution time should be less than the interval.
setting.released_script_placeholder: Executed once when the hotkey is released
setting.releasedScriptHint: Runs once on release. Supports the full scripting DSL.

about.title: About
about.intro: A Scrcpy client built with Rust, Bevy, and React that lets you control your Android device as if you were using an game emulator.
